title: HOUSEHOLD GOODS - 211info
text: ROSEBURG DREAM CENTER HOUSEHOLD GOODS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides dishes, cookware, towels, sheets, blankets, and decor when available. Also accepts donations of these items. 2555 NE Diamond Lake Boulevard Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday 10am-2pm and 4pm-7pm, Tuesday-Thursday 10am-2pm Email (541) 673-5918 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 673-5918 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call to sign up for items. Donors call for information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Douglas County SITE HOURS: Monday 10am-2pm and 4pm-7pm, Tuesday-Thursday 10am-2pm Services: Bedding/Linen Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Kitchenware Kitchenware Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - OPEN HANDS FOOD PANTRY MATERIAL GOODS - IN HIS HANDS CLOTHING MINISTRY MATERIAL GOODS - PERSONAL GROOMING SUPPLIES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
